programme.desc: ATP 250 Vanda Pharmaceuticals Mallorca Championships 2026 takes place at the Mallorca Country Club in Santa Ponça, Spain. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Belgium vs Iran - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Belgium and IR Iran. IR Iran have won only one of their 10 FIFA World Cup matches against European opposition, although that came in their most recent meeting, a 2-0 win over Wales in the 2022 group stage.

programme.title: New Zealand vs Egypt - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be New Zealand and Egypt’s first World Cup meeting – it will also be New Zealand’s first World Cup match against a team from Africa. Egypt are unbeaten in their three previous matches against New Zealand, with two wins and one draw. These three friendlies produced only four goals, the latest coming in March 2024, a 1-0 win for Egypt in Ca

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: “Countdown” is a beIN match day studio from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ broadcast live ahead of the pre match studio. “Countdown” covers the arrival of the players, coaching staff and fans as they experience the matchday stadium and atmosphere for the first time. All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabi

programme.title: Norway vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be Norway and Senegal’s first World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a March 2006 friendly in Dakar – Senegal won 2-1. Norway have faced African opposition just once before at the FIFA World Cup, drawing 2-2 with Morocco in 1998 after twice being behind on the scoresheet.

programme.title: France vs Iraq - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between France and Iraq. France’s two previous World Cup matches against teams from the West Asian Football Federation both ended in victories: 4-1 v Kuwait in 1982 and 4-0 v Saudi Arabia in 1998.

programme.title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Mexico faced Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup, winning 3-1 in their final group game. This will be their first FIFA World Cup meeting since the split of Czechoslovakia in the early 1990s. Czechia and Mexico’s last meeting came in a February 2000 friendly, in Hong Kong, with Czechia winning 2-1.

programme.title: Ecuador vs Germany - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Germany have won their two previous encounters with Ecuador - 3-0 in the group stage of the 2006 World Cup and 4-2 in a May 2013 friendly which was played in Boca Raton, Florida. programme.title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Mexico faced Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup, winning 3-1 in their final group game. This will be their first FIFA World Cup meeting since the split of Czechoslovakia in the early 1990s. Czechia and Mexico’s last meeting came in a February 2000 friendly, in Hong Kong, with Czechia winning 2-1.

programme.title: Ecuador vs Germany - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Germany have won their two previous encounters with Ecuador - 3-0 in the group stage of the 2006 World Cup and 4-2 in a May 2013 friendly which was played in Boca Raton, Florida. Six of Germany’s seven goals against Ecuador have come in the first half, including Lukas Podolski scoring after nine seconds in their last meeting in May 2013.

programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Curaçao and Côte d’Ivoire, and Côte d’Ivoire’s first World Cup match against a CONCACAF nation. Netherlands are unbeaten in their five FIFA World Cup matches

programme.title: Türkiye vs United States - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Türkiye and USA are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Türkiye and USA’s five previous encounters have produced a perfectly balanced record of two wins each and one draw, with seven goals scored by each side. Their last meeting came in a June 2025 friendly during which the USA scored inside the opening minute via Jack McGlynn but Tür

programme.title: Japan vs Sweden - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Japan and Sweden are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Japan and Sweden’s five previous encounters came at the 1936 Olympics and in four later friendlies between 1995 and 2002. Since Japan’s 3-2 victory in 1936, they’re winless in the four encounters since, with the most recent meeting finishing 1-1 in May 2002 prior to that year’s

programme.title: Tunisia vs Netherlands - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Tunisia and Netherlands will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. The Dutch are unbeaten in their three previous friendlies against Tunisia, with the last two ending in draws; Ronald Koeman scored his penultimate goal for the Netherlands in a 2-2 draw in Tunis in January 1994. Netherlands are unbeaten in their five FIFA World Cup matches

programme.title: Curacao vs Ivory Coast - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Curaçao and Côte d’Ivoire, and Côte d’Ivoire’s first World Cup match against a CONCACAF nation. Since the introduction of the FIFA world rankings in 1992, Curaçao could become the lowest ranked team ever to qualify from the group stage at a FIFA World Cup tournament.

programme.title: Ecuador vs Germany - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Germany have won their two previous encounters with Ecuador - 3-0 in the group stage of the 2006 World Cup and 4-2 in a May 2013 friendly which was played in Boca Raton, Florida. Six of Germany’s seven goals against Ecuador have come in the first half, including Lukas Podolski scoring after nine seconds in their last meeting in May 2013.

programme.title: Paraguay vs Australia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
